title: What is the purpose of the Coontx reload?

posts.author: ChristianM (Christian Meyer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, since a couple of weeks clicking on an update notification opens a new tab to load the update but also reloads the page in the old tab via a Coontx referral I presume. What is the purpose of that?
It is a rather annoying behaviour for a professional piece of software.
